title: Fluffy Saudi Baguette Wrap
description: A quick and tasty weeknight dish featuring a fluffy bread wrap filled with a savory mixture of lean meats and vegetables, made low-sodium-friendly.

ingredients.name: Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: Cooked and drained to reduce fat

instructions: Slice the baguette loaf and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a pan, cook ground beef until browned, then drain excess fat. Add chopped onion and minced garlic; stir for about 2 minutes.
If using jalapeno peppers, add them now and continue to cook until softened. Season the mixture with salt and pepper if desired.
Assemble the wraps by placing a slice of low sodium cheese on one half of each baguette slice, followed by a few slices of ham, then fill with the meat and vegetable mixture.
Top with lettuce leaves for added freshness and serve immediately.
Bake the wrapped baguettes in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes until cheese is melted and slightly golden.
Remove from oven, let sit for a few minutes before serving.
